decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q) was stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via oEmbed (HTTP 200) + voidline Studio (Publique, '15 juin 2026 / Publiee', 319v). Set status=PUBLIC + scheduled_at/actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z + views=319. Also corrected v3_answer actual_published_at 2026-06-12 -> 2026-06-05 (Studio ground truth 'It Never Landed' shows 5 juin 110v; the 06-13 reconcile over-trusted scheduled_at).

Studio has an UNTRACKED Short sitting as Brouillon (DRAFT): '9 Barrels Empty. The Mary Celeste Vapor Theory' — the intended v1-bonus ANSWER to pair with the v1_bonus_briggs HOOK. Added to state as v1_bonus_vapor/DRAFT. Per recovery cadence (HOOK Mon + ANSWER Wed) today Wed 06-17 was the ANSWER slot, but the Short was never scheduled out of draft -> missed publish. PIPELINE DRY: nothing is Programmee in Studio; next 3 days (Thu 06-18 / Fri 06-19 / Sat 06-20) empty. Next planned content = v4 Roanoke long-form Sun 06-22 + v4_hook 06-22 / v4_answer 06-24, but v4 long-form is NOT yet in Studio (render pending + Flow thumb blocked per LEARNINGS 06-13). ACTIONS NEEDED: (1) schedule v1_bonus_vapor draft to next ANSWER slot; (2) unblock+finish v4 render before 06-22 or the long-form day slips.
